title: init generator
description: Wires @nx-devkit/prepare-for-release into an Nx workspace: adds the plugin to nx.json, creates a `tools` project with a `prepare-for-release` target, and prints the post-setup checklist.

projectName.description: Name of the workspace project that hosts the prepare-for-release target.

pluginPath.description: Module specifier for the plugin in nx.json plugins[]. Use a relative path or package name.
